gaps.label: T07 AI/LLM in education literature is moving so fast that velocity-based selection will surface low-quality preprints alongside landmark work. Risk of over-representing AI hype relative to empirical evidence.
gaps.detail: Apply additional editorial filter to T07: require either (a) empirical evaluation study design, or (b) published in top-4 venue (AIED, Learning@Scale, EDM, JEDM). Flag pure position papers as WATCH not APPROVED.

gaps.label: T13 High-consequence domain literature (defense, healthcare, nuclear) is heavily grey literature and often not indexed in OpenAlex or Semantic Scholar. DARPA/IARPA/DoD training science publications are largely not public.
gaps.detail: Manual Tier 4 harvest required. Use APL-connected access for DoD publications. Flag LENS @ JHU program as anchor for this literature. CIRCUIT/MERIT program reports are key sources.

gaps.label: T14 Equity and fairness in adaptive learning systems is an emerging literature. Non-US international equity contexts (African ed tech, Global South adaptive learning) almost entirely absent.
gaps.detail: Targeted T4 manual search. Monitor CHI and FAccT conferences as non-traditional venues for this literature. Check Gates Foundation and World Bank ed reports.

gaps.label: T16 IEEE ICICLE BoK is actively being developed — current version may be a draft. Field credentialing standards not yet stable. Risk of citing pre-final BoK.
gaps.detail: Version-track BoK explicitly. Note draft status in recency_flag. Plan re-review when official BoK version released.

gaps.label: T09 Expert knowledge elicitation literature spans cognitive psychology, AI, and HCI — it is highly dispersed. Papers from knowledge engineering and CTA communities may not be well-connected in citation network.
gaps.detail: Supplement algorithmic expansion with manual search of: ACM CHI (expert elicitation track); Knowledge Engineering Review journal; Applied Ergonomics; Human Factors.

gaps.label: T00 Non-English LE literature poorly represented. Important Japanese research in adaptive/ITS systems (University of Tokyo, NII groups); German vocational training (Berufsbildung) literature; French e-learning research.
gaps.detail: Allocate 5 T4 slots to non-English publications. Use Google Scholar for non-OpenAlex sources. Flag English-language bias in corpus documentation.

gaps.label: T11 xAPI and learning data standards landscape is changing rapidly. ADL Initiative publications, IMS Global specifications may not appear in academic citation networks.
gaps.detail: Direct Tier 4 harvest from ADL Initiative website and IMS Global. Track version history of xAPI and Caliper standards.

gaps.label: T17 Design-based research and quasi-experimental methods in education are methodologically important but rarely cited by other LE papers (methodologists cite other methodologists). Risk of under-representation.
gaps.detail: Add DBR Collective 2003 and Brown 1992 as T1 anchors. Manual expansion from Journal of the Learning Sciences methodology papers.

gaps.label: ALL ICICLE resources page harvest has not yet been completed. Unknown number of resources are catalogued there that are not yet in this workbook.
gaps.detail: Complete Step 1 of pipeline (ICICLE page manual harvest) before any algorithmic expansion runs. This is a prerequisite step.

gaps.label: T08 Serious games and XR/VR/AR for learning is partially indexed — major venues (IEEE VR, CHI, Games for Change) not well-connected to LE citation network. Simulation fidelity research in DoD contexts largely grey.
gaps.detail: Supplement via manual search of: IEEE VR; Simulation & Gaming journal; IITSEC proceedings (military simulation); Games for Learning conference.
